{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211803399C41FF436575B38FC612"}"},"total":10209},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7366995714655126296","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的很好，让同为作者的我自行惭愧，刚开始写的时候作者还有些不熟练，有些细节没写到位，但是越到后面作者写得越得心应手了。真的很棒！
人物逻辑顺畅，节奏很快丝毫不拖泥带水（作者不会是想40万就完结吧）剧情有创新点。
最让我惊喜的是人设！女主的人设不争不抢清醒自持，男主前期冷静端水大师，后面沦陷粘人小狼狗。这倒还好。
最喜欢的是几个孩子的设定，各有特点又一致对外，作者一定是一位很善良很温柔的母亲，她不忍看到有一个孩子受到伤害（除了没长成的），心软的人看着很舒适！
还有几位妃子的人设，现在也是越来越丰满了，不是纯好，或者纯坏的，可是这后面可怎么圆呀！
又或许是不死人一致对外，这也挺好的，我真的挺喜欢看他们的日常！
作者质量稳定更新又肥，我来嘴一波，作者这本后面肯定能破两百万在读！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715264194,"group_id":"7346186334815407166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最爱卑微小狗","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyYqfWpTPKoEb93de7whI30=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/df84a39a36cf4451bf3f4ae876c01bee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624093&x-signature=sRyGz%2Bd2Cq26cdD2%2BQfZhl%2FUOz4%3D","user_id":"94880034424","user_name":"鱼先森"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"94880034424","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7346186334815407166","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+宅斗宫斗+无金手指+后期独宠】
张昔年穿越了，穿成了靖王后院的一个侍妾。
上有背景雄厚手段狠厉的王妃，中有无脑且战斗力爆表的侧妃，下有重生女和穿越女斗得你来我往。
张昔年瑟瑟发抖。
她没有金手指，也不想争宠，只想安安分分的当一条咸鱼，好好的苟着，顺便再生个包子，让他给自己养老。
苟着苟着，张昔年就觉得有些不对劲，靖王的眼神为什么她越来越看不懂了，而且她的肚子，更是鼓了一次又一次。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8ff3a876fc01ceaf375246df3549184c","author":"天南星南","author_id":"","book_id":"7346186334815407166","book_name":"穿越后，侍妾苟在王府养包子","book_short_name":"妾室的日常","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7350483752549630488","read_count":"84786","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"480602"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"224","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿越,独宠,魂穿,HE","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/352d55a14b9cd3fc3f3b0518404511a8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779271419&x-signature=Iw6nl32kqf0FRQT9Eh5vVpC5mdY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"106174943780","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"161"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211803399C41FF436575B38FC612"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5147,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35381,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":35194},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1715272448,"author_reply_time":1715272463,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7362999774629643033","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大写的好棒！有吸引力而且人设也一直没出错，剧情紧凑而且接近完美[爱慕]我看的第一本带点宫斗的，好好看啊，打破了我对今穿古女主的认知，好看美味求更[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714342971,"group_id":"7346186334815407166","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8GomFKQ1zT/RXVeSFxEq4Bf7Vdr5eXsL0h0ILD5ITt+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fabf21ed5021490ba75f1dc351ad0e27~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619732&x-signature=acKlHmqEXfvaOExd4qF5%2F%2Fc5%2BRU%3D","user_id":"4092846483709076","user_name":"我说我叫香芋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4092846483709076","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7346186334815407166","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越+宅斗宫斗+无金手指+后期独宠】
